description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with build and lint stages using the rust:latest Docker image (rust:1.36.0 for one job) and global variables APT_CACHE_DIR and PKG_CONFIG_ALLOW_CROSS. Define a cache keyed by $CI_JOB_NAME that stores apt-cache/, cargo/, and target/ directories. For each build job (aarch64-linux-android, aarch64-unknown-linux-gnu, aarch64-unknown-linux-musl, arm-linux-androideabi, arm-unknown-linux-gnueabi, arm-unknown-linux-gnueabihf, arm-unknown-linux-musleabi, armv5te-unknown-linux-gnueabi, armv5te-unknown-linux-musleabi, armv7-linux-androideabi, armv7-unknown-linux-gnueabihf, armv7-unknown-linux-musleabihf, i586-unknown-linux-gnu, i586-unknown-linux-musl, i686-linux-android, i686-unknown-freebsd, i686-unknown-linux-gnu, i686-unknown-linux-musl, mips-unknown-linux-gnu, mips-unknown-linux-musl, mips64-unknown-linux-gnuabi64, mips64el-unknown-linux-gnuabi64, mipsel-unknown-linux-gnu, mipsel-unknown-linux-musl, powerpc-unknown-linux-gnu, powerpc64-unknown-linux-gnu, powerpc64le-unknown-linux-gnu, s390x-unknown-linux-gnu, sparc64-unknown-linux-gnu, x86_64-linux-android, x86_64-unknown-freebsd, x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu, x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu-1.36.0, x86_64-unknown-linux-musl, x86_64-unknown-netbsd) run a before_script that creates $APT_CACHE_DIR, runs apt‑get update, installs build‑essential curl git pkg‑config plus any EXTRA_PACKAGES, adds the $TARGET via rustup, and updates cargo; the script then runs cargo build --target=$TARGET, optionally cargo build --examples and --tests unless DISABLE_EXTRA_BUILDS is set, and runs cargo test unless DISABLE_TESTS is set, with per‑job variables for TARGET, DISABLE_EXTRA_BUILDS, DISABLE_TESTS, EXTRA_PACKAGES, and linker overrides. The clippy job (lint stage) runs rustup component add clippy and cargo clippy --all-targets --all-features with TARGET x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu, and the rustfmt job (lint stage) runs rustup component add rustfmt and cargo fmt -- --check. No artifacts, services, or deployment targets are defined; jobs execute on every pipeline run.
